title: 1 step DFU - User can trigger firmware update for just Charge Case
scenario: 1-step DFU where only Charge Case update is triggered, verifying Earbud stays on lower version while Charge Case updates successfully
steps: Ensure both Earbud (EB) and Charge Case (CC) have available firmware updates.
Click the update button for the Charge Case (Voyager Free 60 Charger Case).
Wait for the DFU process to complete.
Check the firmware version of the Charge Case.
Check the firmware version of the Earbud.
expected: Only the Charge Case DFU completes successfully. The Charge Case is updated to the new firmware version. The Earbud remains on the lower (original) version.
